mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_thread_image(thread_id, sort_no, file_path, original_name, content_type, file_size, status, created_at) VALUES(#{threadId}, #{sortNo}, #{filePath}, #{originalName}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, 1, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM forum_thread_image WHERE thread_id = #{threadId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no ASC, id ASC
